title: Open Redirect
repair_hint: Validate redirect targets, reject protocol-relative URLs starting with //, normalize malformed paths, and allow only same-origin redirects.

title: SQL Injection
repair_hint: Do not interpolate user input into SQL strings. Keep user input as bound parameters passed separately to execute().

title: Cross-Site Scripting
repair_hint: Escape untrusted data before rendering HTML and avoid marking user-controlled content as safe.

title: Path Traversal
repair_hint: Normalize paths, reject .. segments, resolve the absolute path, and ensure it stays inside the intended base directory.

title: OS Command Injection
repair_hint: Avoid shell=True, pass command arguments as a list, and validate user-controlled command arguments.
